scripts.install-all: npm install --prefix ./common/back-common && npm install --prefix ./common/front-common && npm install --prefix ./back && npm install --prefix ./front && npm install --prefix ./games/catan/catan-back && npm install --prefix ./games/catan/catan-front
scripts.build-all: npm run build --prefix ./common/back-common && npm run build --prefix ./common/front-common && npm run build --prefix ./games/catan/catan-back && npm run build --prefix ./games/catan/catan-front && npm run build --prefix ./front && npm run build:bundle --prefix ./back
